channel.title: Vox Language Updates
channel.description: Changelog, release notes, and documentation updates for the Vox AI-native programming language, maintained by the Vox Foundation.

item.title: Architecture Index
item.description: Auto-generated architecture index.

item.title: Dead Crate Deep Dive (2026-05-08)
item.description: Code-level investigation of uncertain DEAD crates: what's unique, what's obviated, where unique code should be preserved.

item.title: Dead Crate Fate Plan (2026-05-08)
item.description: Per-crate recommendation for the 17 DEAD and 3 MISPLACED workspace crates: delete, wire up, extract to plugin, or freeze.

item.title: Pure-Rust Build — Eliminating C/MSVC Dependencies (2026-05-08)
item.description: Pure-Rust Build — Eliminating C/MSVC Dependencies (2026-05-08)

item.title: Crate Classification Audit (2026-05-08)
item.description: Classification of every workspace crate as CORE, PLUGIN, SHARED, DEAD, or MISPLACED. Identifies extraction candidates and deletion candidates.

item.title: Plugin System Audit (2026-05-08)
item.description: Audit of the plugin system after major slim-core extractions — ABI drift, SP7 scaffolds, duplicate code paths, dead deps, and build/distribution optimization.

item.title: Plugin System Deep Audit (2026-05-08)
item.description: Second-pass audit covering ABI completeness, discovery, sandbox model, cross-cutting concerns, and distribution.

item.title: Vox Dashboard — Design Brief for Anthropic Labs Design (2026)
item.description: Screen-by-screen spec for the Vox dashboard redesign. VUV-form code examples, primitive inventory, token map, anti-patterns.

item.title: Vox-Populi Extraction Follow-Up Plan (2026)
item.description: Plan for the remaining code-motion work after the plugin system foundation landed. Covers vox-populi mens/tensor residual, vox-populi transport, vox-tensor…

item.title: Migrating from Cargo Feature Flags
item.description: Mapping from `cargo --features` invocations to the runtime plugin system.

item.title: Picking a Vox bundle
item.description: Decision guide for choosing the right Vox distribution bundle for your use case.

item.title: Mens native training SSOT (Candle QLoRA–first; Burn LoRA deprecated in dispatch)
item.description: Official documentation for Mens native fine-tuning: contract-first Candle QLoRA, legacy Burn paths, merge/serve matrix.

item.title: Plugin Manifest (Plugin.toml)
item.description: Schema for the Plugin.toml file every Vox plugin ships.

item.title: Eval sandbox deployment (Coolify)
item.description: Public MCP HTTP eval gateway at eval.vox-lang.org — image, compose, DNS, Coolify API sync.

item.title: cli
item.description: Documentation for cli.md

item.title: Data Storage Lint & CI Spec (2026)
item.description: Concrete lint and CI rules — clippy.toml additions, deny.toml bans, grep checks, a new `vox ci data-storage-guard` subcommand, and diffs against the *real*…

item.title: Search & Retrieval SSOT (2026)
item.description: Single baseline for how agent-facing retrieval works across vox-db contracts, vox-search execution, orchestrator MCP tools, and dashboard transport — including…

item.title: v1-release-criteria
item.description: v1-release-criteria

item.title: Changelog
item.description: Official documentation for Changelog for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture guides, and implementation patterns

item.title: CLI command surface (generated)
item.description: Auto-generated table of vox command paths and metadata; CLI rows are generated from contracts/operations/catalog.v1.yaml into command-registry.yaml — use vox…

item.title: Telemetry and research_metrics contract
item.description: research_metrics row shape, write validation, session_id prefix conventions, key metric_type semantics, Mens telemetry.jsonl envelope and KPI tiers…

item.title: Vox portability SSOT
item.description: Normative portability contract for Docker/OCI-backed `.vox` deployment, source-of-truth boundaries, and conformance expectations.

item.title: ADR-027: Dual-Track UI Surfaces (Vox-Native vs React/TanStack Interop)
item.description: Splits Vox's UI primitives into a Vox-native reactivity track and an explicit React/TanStack interop track, with a sharp boundary so each track stays coherent…

item.title: Svelte-Mineable Features Implementation Plan (2026)
item.description: Phased implementation plan for the Svelte 5/6-inspired Vox compiler and MCP improvements identified in the comparative research. Concrete file changes, scope…

item.title: Svelte 5/6 vs React Meta-Frameworks — Comparative Research and Mineable Ideas for Vox (2026)
item.description: Comparative analysis of Svelte 5/6, Next.js 15/16, and TanStack Start as competitors and idea sources for Vox's GUI authoring layer. Frames Vox's React-emit…

item.title: v0.8.0 — @require, @pure, @deprecated Decorators; 10 LSP Features
item.description: Added @require, @pure, and @deprecated decorators. Implemented 10 Language Server Protocol features including hover, go-to-definition, and inline diagnostics.

item.title: v0.7.0 — QLoRA Training Pipeline; Socrates Anti-Hallucination Protocol
item.description: Native QLoRA fine-tuning via Candle and qlora-rs. Socrates confidence protocol integrated into the orchestrator for anti-hallucination validation of agent outputs.

item.title: v0.6.0 — Mens Transport; Durable Workflow Runtime MVP
item.description: CPU-first mens registry with optional HTTP control plane. Interpreted workflow runtime MVP supporting local and mens activity hooks.
